reviews.review_description:
Honestly not bad the home room and the codes are very clean and honestly probably better than gorilla tag in my opinion. I suggest getting this game!

NEW RATING
Honestly the owner is pretty rude and disrespectful, game got boring, no one plays, not only that but a 12 year old was in his discord server and the 12 year old baited me (nsfw, and yes I did fall for it I know I’m very dumb) and owner made files and tried to blackmail me, he banned me and never banned the 12 year old (this was a while ago and I did change for yall to know) he also forces reviews and begs people to review 5 stars (yall can hate on me but just know the 12 year old was never supposed to be on discord)

Easy 5 stars. This game is a great game for people who love horror. This game is literally the most underrated game. The monsters are scary, the maps are so unique, and the staff is really nice (ik im staff but like still they are really nice). The monsters are also unique too. I love how some are big and some are small. It just makes the monsters scary because you could be scared for your life on top of a tree or you could be chilling and get jumpscared because of how small the monster is. I love it. Great game, download it
Underrated. It’s so fun when you are playing with friends. This game is amazing even though it came out not too long ago. Nice community, good mods, etc. download rn  ￼
let me make a very swift summary: it is an exquisite game and playing with friends is fun! everyone is super nice and there is a variety of maps and gamemodes
This game is so tuff because it has so much cosmetics and nice moderators the owner is also nice this game also has a good update schedule and its HORROR
Scary guy’s trying to eat me but 10/10 would get eaten again👍
This game is really great. I definitely recommend because the owner and everyone else is so nice. ￼
This game is so peak it’s súper peak trust
THIS GAME HAS EVERYTHING U CAN IMAGINE FROM SCARY MAPS TO COOL COSMETICS AND RIGHT NOW U CAN MEET THE OWNER BECAUSE HE PLAYS LATE NIGHTS SO I WOULD RECOMMEND THIS GAME 200%
I love this game the devs are nice and the make sure your included and the game is so scary and fun try it out!
It's very fun to play and very scary and fun to play wit other people
